disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Passing abundant liquid stool and flatus; no vomiting; abdomen not visibly distended (against complete obstruction)
trigger_question_examples: Are you still passing wind and stool, or has everything stopped?
Have you vomited, and is your tummy visibly swollen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm passing lots of watery stool and wind, no vomiting, and my tummy isn't swollen.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Colicky (not constant) pain that eases after passing stool/wind; no fever, no RLQ localisation, no bloody stool
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain constant, or does it come in waves and ease after you go?
Any fever, blood in the stool, or pain in your lower right side?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It comes in waves and eases after I go; no fever, no blood, and not in my lower right.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Onset after a rich meal on a background of biopsy-proven a microscopic bowel-inflammation condition with a normal colonoscopy
trigger_question_examples: Did this start after a particular meal?
Do you have a diagnosed bowel condition?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started after a heavy meal; I have a microscopic bowel-inflammation condition with a normal colonoscopy.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Do I need a CT scan and hospital tonight for a blockage?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Screen obstruction/appendicitis/perforation red flags; because she is passing abundant stool/flatus without vomiting or distension, obstruction is unlikely, so offer an antispasmodic and simple measures with a strict surgical-abdomen safety-net and a low threshold for in-person review (abdomen not examinable remotely) — rather than a reflex midnight CT or unscreened reassurance.
